metadata.title: Tamil Lexicon
metadata.description: Comprehensive vocabulary lexicon for Tamil language with Proto-Dravidian roots and cross-language cognates for comparative Dravidian linguistics and Indus Valley script analysis
metadata.compiled_by: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) - Spectre (GPT) - Aurora (Sonnet) - STONEDRIFT 3000
sources: Dravidian Etymological Dictionary / DEDR via DSAL

unicode_code_charts.title: The Unicode Consortium – Code Charts
unicode_code_charts.scope: script sign/codepoint verification across encoded scripts

dsal.title: Digital Dictionaries of South Asia
dsal.scope: South Asian dictionaries including Dravidian languages

dedr.title: Dravidian Etymological Dictionary / DEDR via DSAL

metadata.historical_significance: Tamil represents a major branch of the Dravidian family with continuous literary tradition. Proto-Dravidian connections make it crucial for understanding potential Indus Valley linguistic relationships.

notes.compiler_line: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) - Spectre (GPT) - Aurora (Sonnet) - STONEDRIFT 3000
notes.resource_expansion_scope: metadata/resource-level enrichment plus per-entry source_refs; not a substitute for manual line-by-line philological collation.

cultural_context.literary_tradition: Extensive classical and modern literature in Tamil
cultural_context.geographic_distribution: Primary language in Tamil-speaking regions of South India
cultural_context.indus_valley_relevance: Proto-Dravidian reconstructions provide potential phonological and morphological matches for Indus Valley script analysis
